title: Genie One enhancements
body:
* **Chat in Genie One (GA)**: Chat in Genie One is now generally available. Chat provides a unified interface for asking data questions in natural language using your Genie Spaces, dashboards, queries, and metric views. See [Chat in Genie One](/aws/en/genie-one/chat).
* **Documents in Genie One (GA)**: You can now create and share documents from Genie One chat conversations without leaving the interface. Ask Genie One to draft a document, or click **Draft a document** from the homepage. Genie One generates the document and opens it in a canvas pane alongside the conversation, where you can edit and share it. See [Documents in Genie One](/aws/en/genie-one/documents).
